---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a frontend improvement or new user-facing behaviour
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- What should be added or improved? -->

## Affected Route Or Component

<!-- Example: /stats, /webhooks, src/app/docs/page.tsx -->

## User Need

<!-- Who benefits from this and what workflow does it improve? -->

## Proposed Behaviour

<!-- Describe the expected UI, state handling, and API interaction if any. -->

## Accessibility And Responsive Notes

<!-- Keyboard, screen-reader, reduced-motion, color contrast, and mobile considerations. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The implementation matches the described user workflow.
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, and success states are considered where relevant.
- [ ] Accessibility and responsive behaviour are accounted for.
- [ ] Tests and documentation are updated when the change affects behaviour.
